notes: Inferred from 2024 Oaks 'Oaks Play' / superfecta lines.
analysis: Thorpedo Anna looked outstanding in last race plus drew a great post — favorite to win. Leslie's Rose looked strong with a closing kick. Just FYI had to take a wide turn last out and could bounce back. Power Squeeze has the most impressive closing speed and is a value play.
